verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus vir qui non abiit in consilio impiorum,  et in via peccatorum non stetit,  et in cathedra pestilentiæ non sedit ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי־הָאִ֗ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹ֥א הָלַךְ֮ בַּעֲצַ֢ת רְשָׁ֫עִ֥ים וּבְדֶ֣רֶךְ חַ֭טָּאִים לֹ֥א עָמָ֑ד וּבְמוֹשַׁ֥ב לֵ֝צִ֗ים לֹ֣א יָשָֽׁב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man who hath not walked in the counsel of the ungodly, nor stood in the way of sinners, nor sat in the chair of pestilence:
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se, joka ei vaella jumalattomain neuvossa, eikä seiso syntisten tiellä, eikä istu kussa pilkkaajat istuvat;
verses.king_james: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the ungodly, nor standeth in the way of sinners, nor sitteth in the seat of the scornful.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed in lege Domini voluntas ejus,  et in lege ejus meditabitur die ac nocte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אִ֥ם־בְּתוֹרַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֗ה חֶ֫פְצ֥וֹ וּֽבְתוֹרָת֥וֹ יֶהְגֶּ֗ה יוֹמָ֥ם וָלָֽיְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But his will is in the law of the Lord, and on his law he shall meditate day and night.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan rakastaa Herran lakia, ja ajattelee hänen lakiansa päivät ja yöt.
verses.king_james: But his delight is in the law of the Lord; and in his law doth he meditate day and night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit tamquam lignum quod plantatum est secus decursus aquarum,  quod fructum suum dabit in tempore suo :  et folium ejus non defluet ;  et omnia quæcumque faciet prosperabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהָיָ֗ה כְּעֵץ֮ שָׁת֢וּל עַֽל־פַּלְגֵ֫י־מָ֥יִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר פִּרְי֨וֹ ׀ יִתֵּ֬ן בְּעִתּ֗וֹ וְעָלֵ֥הוּ לֹֽא־יִבּ֑וֹל וְכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה יַצְלִֽיחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall be like a tree which is planted near the running waters, which shall bring forth its fruit, in due season. And his leaf shall not fall off: and all whatsoever he shall do shall prosper.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on niinkuin istutettu puu vesiojain tykönä, joka hedelmänsä antaa ajallansa, ja hänen lehtensä ei varise, ja kaikki menestyy, mitä hän tekee.
verses.king_james: And he shall be like a tree planted by the rivers of water, that bringeth forth his fruit in his season; his leaf also shall not wither; and whatsoever he doeth shall prosper.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non sic impii, non sic ;  sed tamquam pulvis quem projicit ventus a facie terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־כֵ֥ן הָרְשָׁעִ֑ים כִּ֥י אִם־כַּ֝מֹּ֗ץ אֲֽשֶׁר־תִּדְּפֶ֥נּוּ רֽוּחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Not so the wicked, not so: but like the dust, which the wind driveth from the face of the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jumalattomat ei ole niin, vaan niinkuin akana, jonka tuuli hajoittelee.
verses.king_james: The ungodly are not so: but are like the chaff which the wind driveth away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ideo non resurgent impii in judicio,  neque peccatores in concilio justorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ לֹא־יָקֻ֣מוּ רְ֭שָׁעִים בַּמִּשְׁפָּ֑ט וְ֝חַטָּאִ֗ים בַּעֲדַ֥ת צַדִּיקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore the wicked shall not rise again in judgment: nor sinners in the council of the just.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden ei jumalattomat kestä tuomiota, eikä syntiset vanhurskasten seuraa.
verses.king_james: Therefore the ungodly shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam novit Dominus viam justorum,  et iter impiorum peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יוֹדֵ֣עַ יְ֭הֹוָה דֶּ֣רֶךְ צַדִּיקִ֑ים וְדֶ֖רֶךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֹּאבֵֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For the Lord knoweth the way of the just: and the way of the wicked shall perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra tietää vanhurskasten tien; mutta jumalattomain tie hukkuu.
verses.king_james: For the Lord knoweth the way of the righteous: but the way of the ungodly shall perish.
